description: Promotion messaging that explicitly highlights availability across multiple franchise locations to maximize reach and reassure customers of accessibility.
structural_recipe: Lead with promotional offer (discount, price point). State the offer scope clearly (e.g., 'خذ كوبك بـ 5 ريال'). Add multi-location coverage statement emphasizing branches/drive-thru availability ('ساري في جميع فروع...'). Include time boundary (month/date) to create urgency. Use fire/excitement emojis to amplify appeal.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value convenience and fairness—knowing a deal is universally available across multiple branches removes friction and builds trust. Multi-location emphasis signals established brand with broad reach, appealing to status-conscious audiences. Geographic inclusivity makes offers feel both generous and accessible regardless of location, driving higher participation and social sharing.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure all listed locations are genuinely offering the promotion to avoid trust damage
Drive-thru availability is culturally significant for female customers; verify before claiming
Time limits must align with actual operational calendars
Verify franchise partners honor pricing before publishing to avoid brand reputation risk
